title: Seed_Coin Currency
description: Adds a simple new seed_coin item for use of trading in your servers and such
body:
Adds one object, the seed coin which is simply just an extra item that could be used as a currency for 1.21.4, this could be used in a server with friends as a placeholder for a currency, personally I use it because I have not found any updated or working currency mods for 1.21.4 that are on aternos or other server modpacks. 

The coin cannot be gained in survival and can only be distributed via commands, it can be used in a circular currency system where a set amount of coins are distributed and shared around over the course of the server. 

Its helpful if as a server owner your server is struggling to control the flow of diamonds or emeralds due to farms, maybe trade isnt enough for you or you want more of a realistic exchange of currency in your server. Whatever use you have for a simple coin in 1.21.4 this can probably do it.
